title: Reasoning Structure of Large Language Models
referenceKeys: minimal inputs remaining 0 or quota 0 when avail
minimal inputs use when digits present are column has or because digit d

references.key: minimal inputs remaining 0 or quota 0 when avail
references.raw: R_LINE_BLOCK (output: NotTent) Essence: The reasoning trace concludes this cell is NotTent BECAUSE the line has no capacity left (full / 0 remaining / quota 0). Minimal inputs: Remaining(...,0) or Quota(...,0) when avail
references.title: Minimal inputs: Remaining(...,0) or Quota(...,0) when avail

references.raw: R_CELL_NEEDS_TREE (output: NotTent) Essence: The reasoning trace concludes this cell is NotTent because a tent must be adjacent to a tree, and this cell has no adjacent tree (as argued). Minimal inputs: referenced Tree(.
references.title: Minimal inputs: referenced Tree(

references.key: minimal inputs use when digits present are column has or because digit d
references.raw: R_UNIT_HAS_STATED (output: UnitHas) Essence: The trace explicitly states a unit contains a digit (inventory or justification). Minimal inputs: [] Use when: \digits present are ...", \column has ...", OR \because digit d
references.title: Minimal inputs: [] Use when: \digits present are ...", \column has ...", OR \because digit d
